basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) Temporary Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website of MANIT Bhopal. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the MANIT Bhopal Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Arch./B.Plan. and M.Arch./M.Plan./M.Tech. (first class) with one year professional experience, First class in UG and PG with Ph.D. (Submitted/Awarded), Ph.D. in relevant discipline with Mathematics at graduation level and M.Sc./MS/M.A./M.Tech. (first class), B.A./B.Sc./B.Com./B.Tech. and M.A./M.Sc./M.Com./MBA (first class in Finance and Statistic) with Ph.D.
qualification.details: Temporary Faculty (Architecture and Planning): B.Arch./B.Plan. and M.Arch./M.Plan./M.Tech. having first class in relevant field with one year of professional experience for Assistant Professor at Academic Grade Pay of Rs. 6000 in top 100 NIRF ranking Institutes or one year industry experience. Turnover of industry should be minimum 20 Crore. Temporary Faculty (Computer Science and Engineering): Candidates having first class in UG and PG with Ph.D. in relevant disciplines. (Submitted/Awarded) Temporary Faculty (Electrical Engineering): Candidates having first class in UG and PG with Ph.D. in relevant disciplines. (Submitted/Awarded) Temporary Faculty (Mathematics, Bioinformatics and Computer Applications): Ph.D. in relevant discipline with Mathematics at graduation level and M.Sc./MS/M.A. in Mathematics/M.Sc. Data Science/M.Tech. in Mathematics and Data Science/Dual Degree B. Tech. and M. Tech. in Mathematics having first class. Temporary Faculty (Humanities & Social Sciences): B.A./B.Sc./B.Com./B.Tech. and M.A./M.Sc./M.Com./MBA having first class in Finance and Statistic and Ph.D. in relevant discipline.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Temporary Faculty (Mathematics, Bioinformatics and Computer Applications)

salary_details.details: Temporary Faculty (Architecture and Planning): Rs. 80,000/- per month for Ph.D. awarded; Rs. 70,000/- per month for Ph.D. submitted Temporary Faculty (Computer Science and Engineering): Rs. 80,000/- per month for Ph.D. awarded; Rs. 70,000/- per month for Ph.D. submitted Temporary Faculty (Electrical Engineering): Rs. 80,000/- per month for Ph.D. awarded; Rs. 70,000/- per month for Ph.D. submitted Temporary Faculty (Mathematics, Bioinformatics and Computer Applications): Rs. 80,000/- per month for Ph.D. awarded; Rs. 70,000/- per month for Ph.D. submitted Temporary Faculty (Humanities & Social Sciences): Rs. 80,000/- per month for Ph.D. awarded; Rs. 70,000/- per month for Ph.D. submitted

all_official_links.label: Download MANIT Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview for MANIT Bhopal is 24th June 2026. However, specific interview dates vary by department, with the last interview scheduled for 1st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Faculty positions at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: The salary offered for Temporary Faculty positions ranges from Rs. 70,000/- to Rs. 80,000/- per month, depending on whether the Ph.D. is submitted or awarded.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Temporary Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by department, but generally include a first-class degree in B.Arch./B.Plan., M.Arch./M.Plan./M.Tech., or a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline, along with specific experience requirements.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for these positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these Temporary Faculty positions at MANIT Bhopal.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Temporary Faculty at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Temporary Faculty positions across various departments at MANIT Bhopal.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Temporary Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Where is MANIT Bhopal located?
faq.answer: MANIT Bhopal is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 462003.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring to the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific experience requirements for the Temporary Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Temporary Faculty (Architecture and Planning) post, one year of professional experience or industry experience is required, with specific turnover criteria for industry experience.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.
